queries.question: For every college campus list all of the associated building descriptions.
queries.sql: select college_campuses.name , buildings.description from College_Campuses_Buildings join Buildings on College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId = Buildings.id join College_Campuses on College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId = College_Campuses.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?college_campuses_buildings a :College_Campuses_Buildings .
  ?buildings a :Buildings .
  ?college_campuses_buildings p:hasBuildings ?buildings .
  ?college_campuses a :College_Campuses .
  ?college_campuses_buildings p:hasCollege_Campuses ?college_campuses .
  ?college_campuses p:name ?name .
  ?buildings p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Give me the types of building that every college campus has and their descriptions.
queries.sql: SELECT Buildings.type, Buildings.description  from College_Campuses_Buildings join Buildings on College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId = Buildings.id join College_Campuses on College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId = College_Campuses.id   GROUP BY College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  College_Campuses)

queries.question: Give me the types of building that every college campus has and their descriptions.

queries.question: List the building description for every college campus.
queries.sql: SELECT Buildings.description  from College_Campuses_Buildings join Buildings on College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId = Buildings.id join College_Campuses on College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId = College_Campuses.id   GROUP BY College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  College_Campuses)

queries.question: Show me a list of buildings that are available at each specific campus
queries.sql: select college_campuses.name , buildings.type from College_Campuses_Buildings join Buildings on College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId = Buildings.id join College_Campuses on College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId = College_Campuses.id

queries.question: Show me a list of buildings that are used at multiple of our campuses
queries.sql: SELECT Buildings.type  from College_Campuses_Buildings join Buildings on College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId = Buildings.id join College_Campuses on College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId = College_Campuses.id   GROUP BY College_Campuses_Buildings.buildingId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT College_Campuses_Buildings.campusId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  College_Campuses)

Give me the types of building that every college campus has and their descriptions.
